prompt: Do we have any previous decisions about how we handle database schema migrations? I want to make sure we're consistent before I add this new table.
assertions: The CLI `decisions list` command was invoked (not just a file search)
The agent checks for decisions related to database or schema migrations specifically
The agent clearly communicates whether matching records were found or not
If no matching records are found, the agent informs the user and offers to create a new decision record
